ValidationRule.description: For OMIT Accounts, Local Shipping address fields should be editable
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR( ISCHANGED( PKI_ShippingCityLocal__c) ,ISCHANGED( PKI_ShippingCountryCodeLocal__c) ,ISCHANGED( PKI_ShippingPostalCodeLocal__c) ,ISCHANGED( PKI_ShippingStateLocal__c) ,ISCHANGED( PKI_ShippingStreetLocal__c) ) ,NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT($User.PKICountry__c))) ,PKI_SAP_Account_Group__c <> 'OMIT' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_ACCOUNT_001: Non-OMIT account cannot be modified directly in SFDC. To modify this account, please use the ‘Account Modification Request’ button
